brief: Compose a NotificationPreferences form section (NotificationPreferences.tsx, named export) using ONLY components imported from '@upskill/components'. It renders inside an existing page, so do NOT emit a main landmark. Contents: a Card containing a Heading; a Select for email digest frequency whose chosen value is held in React state; a one-sentence helper line under the Select rendered in the secondary text color; three Checkboxes for notification channels, each held in React state; and a save Button with a leading check icon. Spacing must come from the layout components' token-based props — no hand-written CSS, inline spacing styles, or media queries.
